summary: AI Chatbot feature fully tested. All 12 backend tests passed (GPT-5.2 responses, demo trigger, lead capture). Fixed bug in /api/chatbot/lead where UUID was being inserted into SERIAL id column. All UI tests passed: FAB visible on 4 marketing pages (/, /investors, /pilot, /telemetry), hidden on /login. Chatbot panel opens with welcome message, 7 quick action buttons work, Live Safety Demo shows 11 color-coded steps, lead capture form with 4 fields works, chat input (Enter & Send button) works.

Backend_Chatbot_APIs.POST /api/chatbot/message - general ques: PASS - Returns GPT-5.2 text response with platform info
Backend_Chatbot_APIs.POST /api/chatbot/message - demo trigger: PASS - Returns demo type with 11 steps for 'run live safety demo'
Backend_Chatbot_APIs.POST /api/chatbot/message - lead prompt: PASS - Returns lead_prompt type for 'deploy pilot'
Backend_Chatbot_APIs.GET /api/chatbot/demo-steps: PASS - Returns 11 steps with system/warning/alert/success/info types
Backend_Chatbot_APIs.POST /api/chatbot/lead: PASS - Stores lead in pilot_leads table (after fix)

Frontend_Chatbot_UI.FAB_on_Homepage: PASS - 'Ask Nagarik AI' button visible on /
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.FAB_hidden_on_Login: PASS - Chatbot FAB not present on /login
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Panel_Opens: PASS - Click FAB opens chat panel with welcome message
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Welcome_Message: PASS - 'Hello! I'm Nagarik AI' greeting displayed
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Quick_Actions_7: PASS - All 7 buttons: About, School Safety, Corporate Safety, Pilot Deployment, Investor Info, Run Demo, Contact Support
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.About_Nagarik_Response: PASS - GPT-5.2 returns detailed platform explanation
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Live_Safety_Demo: PASS - 11 sequential steps with color coding (cyan/amber/red/green)
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Demo_Color_Coding: PASS - system=cyan, warning=amber, alert=red, success=green, info=teal
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Lead_Capture_Form: PASS - 4 fields visible: name, institution, email, city
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Lead_Form_Submission: PASS - Form submits, confirmation message received
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Close_Button: PASS - X button closes chat panel
Frontend_Chatbot_UI.Chat_Input_Enter: PASS - Type message + Enter sends it

bugs_fixed.issue: Lead capture endpoint trying to insert UUID string into SERIAL id column
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed id field from INSERT statement - let PostgreSQL auto-generate

critical_code_review_comments: GPT-5.2 integration via Emergent LLM Key working correctly
SYSTEM_PROMPT is comprehensive with platform details
Keyword-based routing (demo/pilot triggers) works as specified
Demo steps have proper delays (0-3s) totaling ~22s
Lead form collects name, institution, email, city - stores in pilot_leads table
NagarikChatbot component properly uses MARKETING_ROUTES filter
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chatbot feature complete. POST /api/chatbot/message handles general questions (GPT-5.2), demo triggers ('run demo', 'live demo', etc.), and lead prompts ('deploy pilot', 'schedule', etc.). Demo has 11 timed steps. Lead capture saves to pilot_leads table (SERIAL id). Rate limits: 30/min messages, 10/hour leads. Chatbot FAB appears on marketing routes only (/, /investors, /pilot, /telemetry). WhatsApp button also on same routes.
